label: Mog
description: Setting-specific dishes and ingredient overrides for the Mog campaign world.

dishes.name: Stokvis Bay cod in sour buttermilk
dishes.flavor: Pan-fried in salted butter until the onions blacken.

dishes.name: Seared Marsh Iron eels bound in leaves
dishes.flavor: The skin blisters and smokes.

dishes.name: Fried Vagarr eels in brown butter
dishes.flavor: Sharpened with crushed parsley and garlic.

dishes.name: Sasani ghostfish in salt-cured lemons
dishes.flavor: The citrus cuts the fat.

dishes.name: Seaweed and mussel soup in lard
dishes.flavor: It smells of the tide.

dishes.name: Seaweed bread
dishes.flavor: Baked with ground kelp and ash.

dishes.name: Fisherman's stew
dishes.flavor: Day's haul thrown in the pot with tubers and herbs until the bones soften.

dishes.name: Sailor's biscuit
dishes.flavor: Twice-baked: soak it in broth or lose your teeth.

dishes.name: Briganuk pork pie
dishes.flavor: Dried fruit and spices mask the age of the meat.

dishes.name: Embestida cider
dishes.flavor: Thick and cloudy. It burns going down.

dishes.name: Fermented peat beer
dishes.flavor: Tastes of dirt and old fire.

dishes.name: Selving chicken broth
dishes.flavor: Poached in almond milk and ginger. Pour over white bread to soak the marrow.

dishes.name: Roasted Bebedor pike in mulled wine
dishes.flavor: A river predator cooked to the color of rust.

dishes.name: Banquet frumenty
dishes.flavor: Boiled in bone stock and nut milk, thickened with yolk and black pepper.

dishes.name: Salzinburg salata
dishes.flavor: Brined, served cold with pickled roots.

dishes.name: Scholars' tart
dishes.flavor: Baked eggs set with hard cheese and walnuts. Meatless and heavy.

dishes.name: Merchant lamb with sour pomegranate wine
dishes.flavor: Roasted on the spit until the meat falls from the bone.

dishes.name: Court white bread
dishes.flavor: Milled fine and baked pale. Soft on the gums.

dishes.name: Cave pottage
dishes.flavor: Pork, cabbage, barley and cheese melted into the fat at the end.

dishes.name: Altay beef stew
dishes.flavor: Braised in mustard and beer, thickened with stale bread.

dishes.name: Black cave cheese
dishes.flavor: Curds left to rot in the damp dark. Sharpened with mold and ash.

dishes.name: Pork tart
dishes.flavor: Belly and leeks, baked in a rye crust with heavy cream.

dishes.name: Four-grain bread
dishes.flavor: Rough grains mixed and baked dark. Heavy in the hand.

dishes.name: Altay cream
dishes.flavor: Milk scalded with honey and egg yolk. Padded with breadcrumbs and fruit.

dishes.name: Imperial hippocras
dishes.flavor: Red wine boiled with honey and eastern spice. It heats the blood.

dishes.name: Minted seed cake
dishes.flavor: Seeds boiled in sugar, they crack like glass between the teeth.

dishes.name: Briggan red wine
dishes.flavor: Tastes of oak cask and old blood.

dishes.name: Acorn cake
dishes.flavor: Foraged nut flour, lard and sour apple. Buried in coals until the crust sets.

dishes.name: Elderflower curd with forest honey
dishes.flavor: Soured milk set with dark tree honey and crushed berries.

dishes.name: Krevak
dishes.flavor: Rolled oats and smoked lamb boiled in soured milk. It sticks to the ribs.

dishes.name: Cassel mutton
dishes.flavor: Rubbed with garlic and pine needles, spit-roasted over apple wood.

dishes.name: Peat-roasted cliff lamb
dishes.flavor: Lean mutton buried in a smoking pit. It's tough and tastes of the earth.

dishes.name: Juniper brandy
dishes.flavor: Clear spirit favored by mountain dwellers. It strips the throat.

dishes.name: Chur spirit
dishes.flavor: Raw grain alcohol. Smells like a bog fire.

dishes.name: Rough mead of the Greys
dishes.flavor: Fermented with tree bark and tart berries. Drunk hot from the horn.

dishes.name: Ishgavat sesame bread
dishes.flavor: Flat dough from the clay oven, crusted with black cumin and toasted seeds.

dishes.name: Lamb with pomegranate and saffron
dishes.flavor: Boiled down in blood-red fruit juice and honey.

dishes.name: Babak-Vat hummus
dishes.flavor: Crushed beans whipped with sesame paste and garlic, drowned in green oil.

dishes.name: Smoked aubergine with tahini
dishes.flavor: Thrown on coals until they collapse. Mashed with garlic and chilli flakes.

dishes.name: Saffron yellow rice
dishes.flavor: Cooked in mutton fat, mixed with dried grapes and pistachios.

dishes.name: Almond-stuffed figs
dishes.flavor: Sun-dried fruit split and packed with crushed nuts and flower water.

dishes.name: Pomegranate sorbet
dishes.flavor: Syrup and honey poured over mountain ice. It melts quick in the heat.

dishes.name: Khapingi pale wine
dishes.flavor: Tastes of pine sap and old honey.

dishes.name: Date brandy
dishes.flavor: Thick on the tongue, hits like a hammer.

dishes.name: Sesame and honey halva
dishes.flavor: Pressed bricks of dense nougat. It does not spoil.

dishes.name: Dark honey and seed cake
dishes.flavor: Wafer-thin dough, baked until it splinters.

dishes.name: Pot of the Road
dishes.flavor: Goat left to boil from dawn to dusk. Thickened with red wine.

dishes.name: Kaperlyn flatbread
dishes.flavor: Scorched on a flat rock, tough as leather armor.

dishes.name: Centaur-style skewers
dishes.flavor: Wild game soaked in sour milk, speared and cooked over burning sage.

dishes.name: Erb kumis
dishes.flavor: Mare's milk left to sour and ferment in a skin bag.

dishes.name: Barley and game pilaf
dishes.flavor: Boiled in bone stock with scraps of smoked venison.

dishes.name: Sour yoghurt with honey
dishes.flavor: Cut with raw honey and whatever nuts the scavengers find.

dishes.name: Kaperlyn Red
dishes.flavor: Deep ruby hues, drawn straight from the vat.

dishes.name: Pomace rakia
dishes.flavor: Clear firewater made from the rotting dregs of the wine press.

dishes.name: Vük black bread
dishes.flavor: Baked hard beneath the ash. You can break a tooth on it, but it does not rot.

dishes.name: Auroch spord
dishes.flavor: Fresh blood mixed with grain and fat. Stuffed into gut string and boiled.

dishes.name: Gruit cloudy beer
dishes.flavor: Thick, bitter ale fermented with wild scrub instead of hops.

dishes.name: Harengus aquavit
dishes.flavor: Distilled three times over, burns the frost from the lungs.

dishes.name: Pickled parsnips
dishes.flavor: Roots and cabbage packed in salt, left to sour in the cold.
